Henderson Park Native Plant and Wildlife Walk, 2723 Henderson Rd, Tucker, GA 30084, USA

There’s a number of foragables in the small native plant nature walk. The ones I’ve listed are just what was labeled. I’m sure there will be more come the season change. 

Path is paved. There are other trails in the park. Access: Public.
